title: Japanese-Style Teriyaki Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic Japanese rice pilaf dish made with tender beef, russians, and toasted spices.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add thinly sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove beef from saucepan and set aside.
Add pilaf to saucepan and cook until lightly toasted, about 2-3 minutes.
Add russians and cook according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sake, sugar, and sushi vinegar.
Pour sauce mixture over cooked rice and beef, and stir to combine.
Return beef to saucepan and stir to coat with sauce.
Transfer saucepan to a serving platter and garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.
